name: Banana
summary: A convenient source of potassium and vitamin B6, and — with tryptophan on board — a small contributor to serotonin production.

benefits.mechanism: Potassium helps the body excrete sodium and relaxes blood-vessel walls, both of which lower blood pressure. A banana is a portable, reliable source.

citations.title: Potassium — NIH Office of Dietary Supplements (Health Professional Fact Sheet)

benefits.claim: Vitamin B6 for metabolism and mood chemistry
benefits.mechanism: Bananas are a good source of vitamin B6, a cofactor in over 100 enzyme reactions — including the conversion of tryptophan into serotonin and the metabolism of protein and glycogen.

citations.title: Vitamin B6 — NIH Office of Dietary Supplements (Health Professional Fact Sheet)

surprisingFacts.text: Bananas carry both tryptophan and the vitamin B6 needed to turn it into serotonin — though the amounts are modest, so the 'bananas make you happy' claim is more chemistry than pharmacology.
